name: vottun-ai-compliance
displayName: Vottun AI Compliance (EU AI Act Art. 50)
description: Open-source toolkit for certifying, watermarking, detecting and verifying AI-generated content.

capabilities.whatItDoes: Certify AI-generated text content on-chain (server computes hashes + applies server-side watermarking).
Verify a certificate id (vtn_...) or a content hash using /v1/verify/{id_or_hash}.

env.AIACT50_API_KEY: optional; required for get_certificate/listing that needs authenticated endpoints
